news.title: Anthropic is having a moment in the private markets; SpaceX could spoil the party
news.summary: Glen Anderson, president of Rainmaker Securities, says the secondary market for private shares has never been more active — with Anthropic the hottest trade around, OpenAI losing ground, and SpaceX's looming IPO poised to reshape the landscape for everyone.

news.title: Lucid blames dip in Q1 sales on seat supplier issue
news.summary: Lucid said it has resolved the problem and is not changing its guidance for 2026.

news.title: The anonymous social app that thinks it can work in Saudi Arabia
news.summary: When Fizz quietly debuted in Saudi Arabia, founder and CEO Teddy Solomon wasn’t expecting the app to catch on like it did.

news.title: Tesla’s Texas factory workforce reportedly shrunk 22% in 2025
news.summary: Tesla's headcount fell from 21,191 workers to 16,506 workers in 2025, according to a report, as it grappled with its second straight year of declining sales.

news.title: OpenAI executive shuffle includes new role for COO Brad Lightcap to lead ‘special projects’
news.summary: In addition to Lightcap's new role, OpenAI CMO Kate Rouch will be stepping away from the company to focus on cancer recovery, with a plan to return when her health allows.

news.title: Super Meat Boy 3D makes suffering fun
news.summary: The original Super Meat Boy is one of the best-known indie games of all time. news.title: Anker’s Nebula P1 projector is the portable sound king
news.summary: The Soundcore Nebula P1 from Anker isn't the most portable Google TV projector I've ever reviewed, nor is it the brightest. It doesn't even have a built-in battery. news.title: Anthropic essentially bans OpenClaw from Claude by making subscribers pay extra
news.summary: Using OpenClaw with Claude AI is about to get a lot more expensive, thanks to Anthropic's new policy changes. news.title: Trump proposes steep cut to NASA budget as astronauts head for the Moon
news.summary: Congress will likely reject the White House's NASA cuts, just as it did last year.

news.title: Ice Age dice show early Native Americans may have understood probability
news.summary: Ice Age hunter-gatherer "were intentionally relying on random outcomes in repeatable, rule-based ways."

news.summary: Experiments show large majorities uncritically accepting "faulty" AI answers.

news.title: Aiper IrriSense 2 Smart Irrigation System Review: Clever Yet Uneven
news.summary: This hose-attached smart sprinkler maps your yard, rotates on command, and measures water use. Despite these clever features, the results are a little uneven.

news.title: The Trajectory of the Artemis II Moon Mission Is a Feat of Engineering
